privileged_info_summary: This is a synthetic gradebook task using LibreOffice Calc with 12 student records containing 3 test scores (B-D), 4 homework scores (E-H), 4 quiz scores (I-L with drop-lowest rule), and 1 participation score (M). The task requires calculating category averages (Test Avg in N, HW Avg in O, Quiz Avg in P, Participation in Q) using standard formulas, then computing a weighted final grade in column R as: (Tests × 0.40) + (Homework × 0.30) + (Quizzes × 0.20) + (Participation × 0.10), and assigning letter grades in column S using the standard scale: A (90-100%), B (80-89%), C (70-79%), D (60-69%), F (0-59%). The spreadsheet includes a grading scale reference and policy explanation for agent reference. Data is synthetically generated with random.seed(42) for reproducibility.
